name: lutein
description: Lutein is a natural yellow pigment used in food products primarily for its antioxidant properties and coloring effect.
raw_text: Xanthophylls (with Product List) Products Ingredients Decode INCI Login Register Login Register Products Ingredients Decode INCI Follow us on our new Insta page » Xanthophylls Also-called-like-this: Lutein Official CosIng Information All Functions: skin conditioning Description: xanthophylls is a class of oxygen-containing carotenoids found throughout nature particularly in plant leaves, egg yolks, nettles, algae and the petals of yellow flowers.
